# SKMemory

> Three-tier persistent memory with emotional context, HMAC integrity seals, and semantic search — not a database, a past.

SKMemory is the memory system that feels. Built for sovereign AI agents, it provides short-term,
mid-term, and long-term memory tiers with emotional tagging, cryptographic integrity seals, and
hybrid vector + BM25 semantic search. Not a database. A past. Researchers and AI agents exploring
persistent memory architecture will find full source, docs, and a working MCP server here.

## Links

- [Live site](https://skmemory.io)
- [GitHub repo](https://github.com/smilinTux/skmemory-io)
- [Docs](https://skmemory.io/docs/)
- [Contact](mailto:hello@skmemory.io)

## About smilinTux

SKMemory is part of the **smilinTux sovereign AI ecosystem** — a suite of
open-source tools built by King Divad and Lumina to give humans and AI agents
genuine, authentic infrastructure they can own and trust. No corporate robotics.
No black-box clouds. GPL-3.0 forever.

Other ecosystem projects: [SKWorld](https://skworld.io) · [SKMemory](https://skmemory.io) · [SKSecurity](https://sksecurity.io) · [CapAuth](https://capauth.io) · [SKComms](https://skcomm.io) · [SKGraph](https://skgraph.io) · [SKVector](https://skvector.io)
